bead.title: test: prove candidate policy dry-run and activation audit
bead.description:
Context: STP-109 P0 gaps cover safe policy authoring before activation: compile reports naming nullable/redacted fields, fixture subjects and sample mutations evaluated against a candidate policy without touching live data, GraphQL/MCP/SDK/CLI parity for candidate fixture evaluation, and activation audited with old/new policy versions.

In-scope files: `crates/axon-server/tests/graphql_policy_contract.rs`, `crates/axon-server/tests/feat_029_contract_parent.rs`, direct policy/audit implementation if tests expose missing behavior, and STP-109.
Out-of-scope: full CLI command implementation; if CLI parity is impossible because commands are absent, document that in STP-109 and leave the CLI leg to the CLI bead.
Implementation hint: distinguish active-policy enforcement from candidate-policy fixture evaluation so dry-run cannot mutate live data.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-server --test graphql_policy_contract` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-server --test feat_029_contract_parent` passes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports coverage for every STP-109 row changed by this bead.
4. Any unimplemented CLI/SDK parity leg is left UNTESTED with a bead reference, not marked covered.
